title: Implement Telemetry Storage, Aggregation, And Retention
description: Add storage-layer APIs to persist per-attempt telemetry artifacts under `.orchestrator/telemetry/<bead_id>/`, update bead metadata telemetry aggregates, and enforce raw-attempt retention caps.
acceptance_criteria: Storage writes attempt JSON artifacts with required fields including nullability and error object behavior on failure paths.
Bead metadata aggregates are updated centrally (`attempt_count`, token totals, last attempt metadata, warning flag when applicable).
Retention uses `ORCHESTRATOR_TELEMETRY_MAX_ATTEMPTS` with default 50, invalid overrides fallback to default, and pruning happens only after successful new-write without mutating aggregates.
block_reason: Deferred by operator: archived for now; do not schedule.
